about.title: About Us
about.description: M-International is an international company specializing in manufacturing and promoting natural health supplements. We operate in 50+ countries worldwide.
about.missionText: Making health accessible to everyone. We create the highest quality products to help people live longer and better.
about.visionText: To become a global leader in the natural supplement industry, combining science and nature for the health of humanity.
about.valuesText: Quality, integrity, innovation and care for people — the foundation of everything we do.
about.mottoText: Health is the greatest wealth. We help preserve it.
about.teamDescription: Years of growth, development and victories
